title: Giro d’Italia Women Stage 3: Balsamo Makes It Two in a Row, Lily Williams 2nd
content:
Italian sprinter takes advantage in chaotic finale to win ahead of HPH's Williams as Giro Women changes gears Tuesday for a decisive climbing time trial.

Read the full article at Giro d’Italia Women Stage 3: Balsamo Makes It Two in a Row, Lily Williams 2nd on Velo.
